name: aj-skills
description: Reusable Agent Skills for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and other SKILL.md-compatible coding agents.

skills.name: brainstorm
skills.description: Activates a focused brainstorm mode for back-and-forth thinking sessions. Use when the user wants to think through a problem, generate ideas, explore options, plan something, or reach a decision collaboratively.

skills.name: illustrations
skills.description: Generate Ian-style English article illustrations. Use when the user wants absurd, clean, hand-drawn inline illustrations, article art, blog visuals, Notion visuals, workflow visuals, methodology visuals, metaphor sketches, shot lists, or image edits/removing titles.

skills.name: setup-workspace
skills.description: Set up a customizable local project workspace for a knowledge worker so any AI agent can work alongside them. Use only when the user explicitly asks to set up, scaffold, or reorganize a workspace for human-agent collaboration.

skills.name: to-prd
skills.description: Turn the current conversation context into a PRD and publish it to the project issue tracker. Use when the user wants to create a PRD from the current context.
